_comment: B5 CCG Premiere — full list merged from uploaded data. Characters: cost & D/I/P/military(<-leadership) from stats. Fleets/Locations=military, Groups=intrigue, Enhancements grant +tier to one ability when attached (all rarity-tiered), Events are one-shot draws, Agendas/Aftermath are Power riders. Hand-correct any value via the in-app Card Editor.

cards.name: Jeffrey Sinclair
cards.text: Human Ambassador. Jeffrey Sinclair begins the game in your Ambassador Zone. He may not be removed from play by card effects.

cards.name: G'Kar
cards.text: Narn Ambassador. G'Kar begins the game in your Ambassador Zone.

cards.name: Delenn
cards.text: Minbari Ambassador. Delenn begins the game in your Ambassador Zone.

cards.name: Londo Mollari
cards.text: Centauri Ambassador. Londo Mollari begins the game in your Ambassador Zone.

cards.name: Adira Tyree
cards.text: While Adira Tyree is in your Inner Circle, you may look at one opponent's hand once per round.

cards.name: Ashan
cards.text: Minbari character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Carn Mollari
cards.text: While Carn Mollari is in your Inner Circle, gain 1 extra Influence when you win a Diplomacy conflict.

cards.name: Centauri Agent
cards.text: Generic Centauri agent.

cards.name: Centauri Aide
cards.text: Generic Centauri aide.

cards.name: Centauri Captain
cards.text: Generic Centauri captain. +1 Military to one Centauri fleet while in Inner Circle.

cards.name: Centauri Telepath
cards.text: Centauri Telepath may participate in Psi conflicts as a supporting character.

cards.name: Drigo
cards.text: Centauri character.

cards.name: Emperor Turhan
cards.text: While Emperor Turhan is in your Inner Circle, you may not initiate Military conflicts. At the start of each round, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Lady Ladira
cards.text: Once per round, you may look at the top card of any player's draw pile.

cards.name: Lady Morella
cards.text: While Lady Morella is in your Inner Circle, once per game you may return one of your discarded character cards to your hand.

cards.name: Lord Kiro
cards.text: Lord Kiro may participate in Intrigue conflicts against any faction.

cards.name: Lord Refa
cards.text: While Lord Refa is in your Inner Circle, your Intrigue conflict totals gain +2.

cards.name: Lord Valo
cards.text: Generic Centauri noble.

cards.name: Lyndisty
cards.text: Centauri character. May join any conflict as a supporter.

cards.name: Minister Malachi
cards.text: While Minister Malachi is in your Inner Circle, once per round you may discard a card to cancel an opponent's Event card.

cards.name: Urza Jaddo
cards.text: Centauri character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Vir Cotto
cards.text: Centauri character. When Vir Cotto is in your Inner Circle, your ambassador is immune to Intrigue conflicts.

cards.name: Bester
cards.text: Psi Corps. When Bester participates in a Psi conflict, add 3 to your total instead of his Psi stat. Bester may not be healed.

cards.name: Frederick Lantz
cards.text: Human character. While in Inner Circle, gain 1 additional Influence from Diplomacy conflicts.

cards.name: General Franklin
cards.text: While General Franklin is in your Inner Circle, all your fleets gain +1 Military.

cards.name: General Hague
cards.text: While General Hague is in your Inner Circle, you may initiate Military conflicts even when another player has declared a blockade.

cards.name: Human Agent
cards.text: Generic Human agent.

cards.name: Human Aide
cards.text: Generic Human aide.

cards.name: Human Captain
cards.text: Generic Human captain. +1 Military to one Human fleet while in Inner Circle.

cards.name: John Sheridan
cards.text: When John Sheridan participates in a Military conflict, add 2 to your fleet's Military total.

cards.name: Luis Santiago
cards.text: While Luis Santiago is in your Ambassador Zone (not Inner Circle), gain 2 Influence at the start of each round.

cards.name: Miagi Hidoshi
cards.text: Human character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Michael Garibaldi
cards.text: While Michael Garibaldi is in your Inner Circle, once per round you may look at the top card of one opponent's draw pile.

cards.name: Sandra Hiroshi
cards.text: Human character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Sarah
cards.text: Human character. Psi Corps operative. +1 Psi to any character while in Inner Circle.

cards.name: Senator Voudreau
cards.text: While Senator Voudreau is in your Inner Circle, Diplomacy conflicts you initiate cannot be cancelled by Event cards.

cards.name: Stephen Franklin
cards.text: While Stephen Franklin is in your Inner Circle, once per round you may heal one face-down character in your Inner Circle for free.

cards.name: Susan Ivanova
cards.text: While Susan Ivanova is in your Inner Circle, your fleets gain +2 Military in conflicts you initiate.

cards.name: Talia Winters
cards.text: Talia Winters may participate in Psi conflicts for any faction.

cards.name: Warren Keffer
cards.text: Human character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Zack Allen
cards.text: While Zack Allen is in your Inner Circle, once per round you may discard a card to look at one opponent's hand.

cards.name: Delenn Transformed
cards.text: Replaces Delenn in your Ambassador Zone. All your Diplomacy and Psi conflict totals gain +3. Human and Minbari characters may both join your Inner Circle.

cards.name: Dhaliri
cards.text: Minbari character. While in Inner Circle, opponents must spend 1 extra Influence to target your characters with Intrigue conflicts.

cards.name: Draal
cards.text: Draal may not be targeted by Conflict cards. While in your Inner Circle, draw one extra card per round.

cards.name: Durlan
cards.text: Minbari character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Hedronn
cards.text: While Hedronn is in your Inner Circle, Minbari faction Agendas cost 1 less Influence to play.

cards.name: Kalain
cards.text: Minbari character. While in Inner Circle, your Military conflicts gain +1.

cards.name: Lennier
cards.text: While Lennier is in your Inner Circle, once per round you may move a card from your discard pile to the bottom of your draw pile.

cards.name: Lovell
cards.text: Minbari character. Once per round, Lovell may add 1 to your Diplomacy conflict total.

cards.name: Minbari Agent
cards.text: Generic Minbari agent.

cards.name: Minbari Aide
cards.text: Generic Minbari aide.

cards.name: Minbari Captain
cards.text: Generic Minbari captain. +1 Military to one Minbari fleet while in Inner Circle.

cards.name: Minbari Telepath
cards.text: Minbari Telepath adds her Psi to any Minbari Psi conflict.

cards.name: Neroon
cards.text: While Neroon is in your Inner Circle, all your Military conflict totals gain +2.

cards.name: Rathenn
cards.text: While Rathenn is in your Inner Circle, each round you may discard the top card of any opponent's draw pile.

cards.name: Shakat
cards.text: Warrior caste. While in Inner Circle, your fleets that participate in Military conflicts gain +2 Military.

cards.name: Shal Mayan
cards.text: Minbari character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Warleader Shakiri
cards.text: Warrior Caste. While Warleader Shakiri is in your Ambassador Zone, all your Military conflicts gain +3. Shakiri may not move to Inner Circle.

cards.name: Du'Nar
cards.text: Narn character. While in Inner Circle, your Intrigue conflicts gain +1.

cards.name: Du'Rog
cards.text: Narn character. Supporting role only. Du'Rog may join Intrigue conflicts.

cards.name: G'Drog
cards.text: Narn character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: G'Sten
cards.text: While G'Sten is in your Inner Circle, all your Military conflicts gain +2 and your fleets are immune to Enhancement cards played by opponents.

cards.name: Ja'Doc
cards.text: Narn character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Kha'Mak
cards.text: While Kha'Mak is in your Inner Circle, once per round you may cancel one opponent's Event card by discarding a card.

cards.name: Ko'Dath
cards.text: Narn character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Na'Far
cards.text: While Na'Far is in your Inner Circle, you gain 1 extra Influence whenever you win an Intrigue conflict.

cards.name: Na'Kal
cards.text: While Na'Kal is in your Inner Circle, all your Military conflicts gain +1.

cards.name: Na'Toth
cards.text: While Na'Toth is in your Inner Circle, your Intrigue conflict totals gain +2.

cards.name: Narn Agent
cards.text: Generic Narn agent.

cards.name: Narn Aide
cards.text: Generic Narn aide.

cards.name: Narn Captain
cards.text: Generic Narn captain. +1 Military to one Narn fleet while in Inner Circle.

cards.name: Ta'Lon
cards.text: While Ta'Lon is in your Inner Circle, your ambassador cannot be targeted by Intrigue conflicts.

cards.name: Tu'Pari
cards.text: Thenta Makur assassin. When Tu'Pari participates in an Intrigue conflict, if you win, the losing player must discard one character from their Inner Circle.

cards.name: Catherine Sakai
cards.text: Neutral character. Catherine Sakai may be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, draw 1 additional card per round.

cards.name: Cynthia Torqueman
cards.text: ISN reporter. While in Inner Circle, once per round you may force one opponent to reveal the top card of their draw pile.

cards.name: Dan Randall
cards.text: Neutral character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Disaffected Centauri
cards.text: May be recruited by any non-Centauri faction. While in Inner Circle, cancel 1 Influence gain of the Centauri player each round.

cards.name: Disaffected Human
cards.text: May be recruited by any non-Human faction. While in Inner Circle, cancel 1 Influence gain of the Human player each round.

cards.name: Disaffected Minbari
cards.text: May be recruited by any non-Minbari faction. While in Inner Circle, cancel 1 Influence gain of the Minbari player each round.

cards.name: Disaffected Narn
cards.text: May be recruited by any non-Narn faction. While in Inner Circle, cancel 1 Influence gain of the Narn player each round.

cards.name: Elric
cards.text: Technomage. May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, once per game you may return all cards in your discard pile to your draw pile (shuffle).

cards.name: Jason Ironheart
cards.text: Psi mutant. May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, your Psi conflicts gain +4. After winning a Psi conflict, Jason Ironheart is discarded.

cards.name: Jha'Dur
cards.text: Deathwalker. May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, your Diplomacy conflicts gain +3. Cannot be healed.

cards.name: Lyta Alexander
cards.text: Neutral telepath. May be recruited by any faction. Adds Psi to any faction's Psi conflict.

cards.name: Marcus Cole
cards.text: Ranger. May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, your Military conflicts gain +2 and your Intrigue conflicts gain +1.

cards.name: Mary Ann Cramer
cards.text: Neutral character. Supporting role only.

cards.name: Morden
cards.text: Agent of the Shadows. May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, once per round you may add 2 to any one conflict total (yours or an opponent's).

cards.name: Mr. Adams
cards.text: Neutral character. While in Inner Circle, opponents' Event cards targeting you cost 1 extra Influence.

cards.name: N'Grath
cards.text: Black market dealer. May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, once per round draw an extra card.

cards.name: Rogue Soul Hunter
cards.text: May be recruited by any faction. When the Rogue Soul Hunter participates in an Intrigue conflict and you win, take 1 card at random from the losing player's hand.

cards.name: Soul Hunter
cards.text: May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, Aftermath cards cost your opponents 1 extra Influence.

cards.name: Kosh Naranek
cards.text: Vorlon Ambassador. May be recruited by any faction. While in Inner Circle, all your Diplomacy conflicts gain +2. Kosh Naranek cannot be damaged or discarded by card effects.

cards.name: Colonial Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Basic Centauri colonial patrol force.

cards.name: Deep Space Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Centauri deep-space patrol fleet.

cards.name: Expeditionary Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Centauri expeditionary force.

cards.name: First Battle Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Centauri primary battle fleet.

cards.name: Garrison Fleet
cards.text: Centauri garrison. This fleet may defend Centauri Location cards even when rotated.

cards.name: Homeworld Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Centauri homeworld defense fleet.

cards.name: Picket Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Basic Centauri border patrol.

cards.name: Second Battle Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Centauri reserve battle fleet.

cards.name: Third Battle Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Elite Centauri battle fleet. This fleet's Military value cannot be reduced below 5 by card effects.

cards.name: Utility Fleet (Centauri)
cards.text: Centauri transport and support vessels.

cards.name: Colonial Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Basic Human colonial patrol force.

cards.name: Deep Space Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Human deep-space patrol fleet.

cards.name: Expeditionary Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Human expeditionary force.

cards.name: First Battle Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Earth Alliance primary battle fleet.

cards.name: Fleet of the Line
cards.text: The pride of the Earth Alliance. Rotate: add 4 Military to the current conflict total. This fleet may not participate in more than one conflict per round.

cards.name: Homeworld Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Earth defense fleet.

cards.name: Picket Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Basic Human border patrol.

cards.name: Reserve Fleet
cards.text: Human reserve fleet. This fleet may be brought into play during the Aftermath phase.

cards.name: Second Battle Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Human reserve battle fleet.

cards.name: Utility Fleet (Human)
cards.text: Human transport and support vessels.

cards.name: Colonial Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbari colonial defense fleet.

cards.name: Deep Space Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbari deep-space warships.

cards.name: Expeditionary Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbari expeditionary fleet.

cards.name: First Battle Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbari primary battle fleet.

cards.name: Grey Council Fleet
cards.text: Minbari War Cruisers commanded by the Grey Council. This fleet's Military value cannot be reduced by card effects.

cards.name: Homeworld Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbar defense fleet.

cards.name: Picket Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbari border patrol.

cards.name: Second Battle Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbari reserve battle fleet.

cards.name: Third Battle Fleet (Minbari)
cards.text: Minbari veteran battle fleet.

cards.name: Warleader's Fleet
cards.text: Warleader Shakiri's personal command. +2 Military when Warleader Shakiri is in play.

cards.name: Colonial Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn colonial defense fleet.

cards.name: Deep Space Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn deep-space patrol fleet.

cards.name: Expeditionary Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn expeditionary force.

cards.name: First Battle Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn primary battle fleet.

cards.name: Heavy Fleet
cards.text: Narn heavy warships. Rotate: cancel one Military Enhancement played by an opponent this conflict.

cards.name: Homeworld Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn homeworld defense fleet.

cards.name: Picket Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn border patrol.

cards.name: Second Battle Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn reserve battle fleet.

cards.name: Strike Fleet
cards.text: Narn strike force. This fleet may participate in Intrigue conflicts in addition to Military.

cards.name: Utility Fleet (Narn)
cards.text: Narn transport and support vessels.

cards.name: Drazi Sunhawk
cards.text: Drazi warships. May be played by any faction. While in play, this faction's Military conflicts gain +1.

cards.name: Ipsha Battleglobe
cards.text: Ipsha warships. May be played by any faction. May participate in both Military and Diplomacy conflicts.

cards.name: Markab Fleet
cards.text: Markab warships. May be played by any faction. +1 Military for each other Non-Aligned fleet in play.

cards.name: Vree Saucers
cards.text: Vree warships. May be played by any faction. Rotate: add 2 to your Intrigue conflict total instead of Military.

cards.name: A Rising Power
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 additional Influence whenever you win a Diplomacy conflict.

cards.name: As It Was Meant To Be
cards.text: Major Agenda. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Once per round, you may rotate this Agenda to force all other players to pass their next action.

cards.name: Defense in Depth
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: When an opponent targets your character with a conflict, you may rotate this Agenda to add 2 to your defense total.

cards.name: Higher Calling
cards.text: Major Agenda. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence at the start of each round.

cards.name: Imperialism
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Your Military conflicts reward 1 additional Influence when won.

cards.name: Infiltrate and Exploit
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence whenever an opponent plays an Event card.

cards.name: Knowledge is Power
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Once per round, draw 1 extra card.

cards.name: Maintain the Peace
cards.text: Major Agenda. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 2 Influence instead of 1 when you successfully stop a Military conflict as a defender.

cards.name: Meddling with Others
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: When an opponent wins a conflict by more than 3, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Peace In Our Time
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence for each round in which no Military conflict occurs.

cards.name: Power Politics
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: When you play an Event card during another player's turn, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Seizing Advantage
cards.text: Major Agenda. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: When any player is eliminated from a conflict, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Strength in Adversity
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence whenever one of your characters is damaged in a conflict.

cards.name: Support of the Mighty
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: When you support another player's conflict, gain 1 Influence if that player wins.

cards.name: The Hope of Peace
cards.text: Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence at the end of any round in which no conflict was lost by you.

cards.name: Total War
cards.text: Win Condition: Have strictly more total Military than every other player. Ongoing: Your fleets gain +1 Military. You may not play Diplomacy conflict cards.

cards.name: Growth in Chaos
cards.text: Centauri only. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence whenever any player loses an Intrigue conflict.

cards.name: Rise of the Republic
cards.text: Centauri only. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence for each Centauri Location card you have in play.

cards.name: Alliance of Races
cards.text: Human only. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: When you support another player's Diplomacy conflict and they win, gain 2 Influence.

cards.name: Leading the Races
cards.text: Human only. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 1 Influence whenever you initiate a conflict that another player joins as a supporter.

cards.name: Forced Evolution
cards.text: Major Agenda. Win Condition: Have the most characters in your Inner Circle. Ongoing: Characters you recruit cost 1 less Influence.

cards.name: Order Above All
cards.text: Major Agenda. Win Condition: Have more total Military strength than any other player. Ongoing: Your fleets gain +1 Military.

cards.name: Finish the War
cards.text: Minbari only. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Your Military conflicts against Human players gain +3.

cards.name: Servants of Order
cards.text: Minbari only. Win Condition: Have the most characters in your Inner Circle. Ongoing: At the start of each round, if you have 3 or more characters in your Inner Circle, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Never Again
cards.text: Narn only. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Gain 2 Influence whenever you win a Military conflict against the Centauri player.

cards.name: Revenge
cards.text: Narn only. Win Condition: Reach 20 Influence. Ongoing: Once per round, you may spend 1 Influence to add 2 to your Military conflict total against one opponent.

cards.name: A Brighter Future
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. All supporters gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Affirmation of Peace
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Affirmation of Power
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence.

cards.name: Alliance
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. One other player may join this conflict as a supporter.

cards.name: Campaign for Support
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence.

cards.name: Compatible Goals
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. The winner may look at one opponent's hand.

cards.name: Complete Support
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. All other players must either support or oppose.

cards.name: Condemn Deportations
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. Loser loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Consolidated Position
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. No Aftermath cards may be played after this conflict.

cards.name: Demonstrative Victory
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence and may rotate one opposing Enhancement.

cards.name: Euphrates Treaty
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. For the rest of the round, no Military conflicts may be initiated.

cards.name: Extreme Sanction
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. If winner has 4+ Diplomacy characters, gain 1 additional Influence.

cards.name: Humanitarian Aid
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence and may heal one damaged character in their Inner Circle.

cards.name: Immortality Serum
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 4 Influence. Both players must commit their Ambassador.

cards.name: Loss of Support
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser loses 1 Influence and must discard one card.

cards.name: Neutrality Treaty
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. The loser may not initiate conflicts next round.

cards.name: Non-Aggression Pact
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser may not attack winner with Military conflicts next round.

cards.name: Non-Aligned Support
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. A Non-Aligned fleet may join as a free participant.

cards.name: Parliament of Dreams
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Each player who participates gains 1 Influence regardless of outcome. Winner gains 2 additional Influence.

cards.name: Rally the People
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. You may use your Leadership stat instead of Diplomacy.

cards.name: Saber Rattling
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. You may commit fleets to add Military to your Diplomacy total (half value, rounded down).

cards.name: Stop Hostilities
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. Cancel one ongoing Military conflict.

cards.name: Supplement Security
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Place one Security token on your Ambassador Zone; opponents' Intrigue conflicts against you are at -1 this round.

cards.name: Test Their Mettle
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser's ambassador is face-down until healed.

cards.name: Trade Pact
cards.text: Diplomacy conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence and draws 1 card.

cards.name: Attacking Pawns
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence and may look at one opponent's hand.

cards.name: Bio-Weapon Discovery
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. Loser must discard 2 cards.

cards.name: Black Market
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence and draws 1 card.

cards.name: Court the Rebellious
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence and may recruit one Neutral character from the discard pile for free.

cards.name: Dishonor
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. Loser loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Forced Impairment
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser must rotate one of their characters.

cards.name: Free the Souls
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. Loser must discard one enhancement from play.

cards.name: Hate Crime
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser loses 2 Influence.

cards.name: Hunter, Prey
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. Loser's highest-Intrigue character is damaged.

cards.name: Kidnapping
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser must rotate one Supporting Role character for 2 rounds.

cards.name: Muddy the Waters
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. All other players must discard 1 card.

cards.name: Na'Ka'Leen Feeder
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser's ambassador cannot participate in conflicts next round.

cards.name: Precision Strike
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Name a character; if the loser has that character in their Inner Circle, it is discarded.

cards.name: Psi Interrogation
cards.text: Intrigue conflict using Psi bonus. Winner gains 1 Influence and draws 2 cards.

cards.name: Purge the Disloyal
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence and may move a character from the loser's Inner Circle to Supporting Role.

cards.name: Sabotage
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser must rotate one fleet.

cards.name: Sponsor Rebels
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser loses 1 Influence per Location card they have in play.

cards.name: Technological Espionage
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence and may copy one Enhancement effect from loser's play area until end of round.

cards.name: Temptations
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. Winner may place one of the loser's group cards under their control until start of next round.

cards.name: Terrorist Bombings
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser loses 1 Influence and one Location card in play is rotated.

cards.name: Witness Protection
cards.text: Intrigue conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. Loser must discard one Group card from play.

cards.name: Blockade
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. If winner has a Location in play, gain 1 additional Influence. The loser's fleets may not participate in other conflicts this round.

cards.name: Border Raid
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence and may rotate one opposing Location card.

cards.name: Crusade
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 3 Influence. All fleets committed to this conflict are rotated afterward regardless of outcome.

cards.name: Establish Base
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence and may play a Location card from hand for free.

cards.name: Gunboat Diplomacy
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. May use Leadership stat instead of Military.

cards.name: Limited Strike
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence. Only Picket, Colonial, and Utility fleets may participate.

cards.name: Peacekeeping
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence and may prevent one other player from initiating Military conflicts next round.

cards.name: Raid Shipping
cards.text: Military conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence and may steal 1 Influence from the loser.

cards.name: Shadow Assault
cards.text: Military conflict. +3 bonus to your fleet Military total. Winner gains 2 Influence.

cards.name: Psi Attack
cards.text: Psi conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser must rotate their highest-Psi character.

cards.name: Telepathic Scan
cards.text: Psi conflict. Winner gains 1 Influence and may look at the loser's entire hand.

cards.name: Sleeper Personality
cards.text: Intrigue/Psi combined conflict. Winner gains 2 Influence. Loser must place one of their Inner Circle characters face-down.

cards.name: The Great Machine
cards.text: Any conflict type. Winner gains 4 Influence. All players must commit at least one character.

cards.name: Babylon 5 Unrest
cards.text: Ongoing. All players' Influence costs for playing cards increase by 1. Discard at end of round.

cards.name: Upgraded Defenses
cards.text: Babylon 5 Enhancement. While in play, all Military conflicts initiated at Babylon 5 gain +2 to the defender's total.

cards.name: The Eye
cards.text: Attach to a Centauri Character. That character gains +3 Diplomacy and +2 Intrigue. Only one Centauri character may have this Enhancement.

cards.name: Backroom Dealing
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 Intrigue.

cards.name: Concealed Weapon
cards.text: Attach to a Character. Once per conflict, rotate this Enhancement to add 2 to your Intrigue total.

cards.name: Covert Allies
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 to all stats.

cards.name: Isolated
cards.text: Attach to an opponent's Character. That character is removed from their Inner Circle and placed in Supporting Role. The character cannot be moved back to Inner Circle while this Enhancement is in play.

cards.name: Latent Telepath
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 Psi and may participate in Psi conflicts.

cards.name: Luxuries of Homeworld
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 Diplomacy. Once per round, you may spend 1 Influence to prevent this character from being rotated.

cards.name: Overworked
cards.text: Attach to an opponent's Character. That character is rotated at the start of each round. The opponent must spend 1 extra Influence to unrotate it.

cards.name: Personal Protection
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character cannot be targeted by Intrigue conflicts.

cards.name: Power Posturing
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +3 Leadership. While this Enhancement is in play, your Military conflicts gain +1.

cards.name: Prophecy
cards.text: Attach to a Character. Once per game, rotate this Enhancement to look at the top 5 cards of any draw pile and rearrange them in any order.

cards.name: Psi Bodyguard
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 Psi and cannot be targeted by Intrigue conflicts while this Enhancement is attached.

cards.name: Pulling Strings
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +1 to all stats.

cards.name: Security Training
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 Intrigue and +1 Leadership.

cards.name: Shunned
cards.text: Attach to an opponent's Character. That character loses 2 from all stats (minimum 0). Discard when that character is healed.

cards.name: Vorlon Enhancement
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 to all stats and the ability to participate in any conflict type.

cards.name: Working Relationship
cards.text: Attach to a Character. That character gains +2 Diplomacy. Once per round you may use this character's Diplomacy to support another player's Diplomacy conflict.

cards.name: Assault Troops
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. All your fleets gain +1 Military.

cards.name: Draft
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. Once per round, you may bring one fleet from your draw pile into play for 1 Influence.

cards.name: Fixed in Their Ways
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. Your Influence costs for playing cards of your own faction are reduced by 1 (minimum 1).

cards.name: Forced Commitment
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. Once per round, you may force one opponent to commit their ambassador to a conflict you initiate.

cards.name: Isolationism
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. Your characters cannot be targeted by Psi conflicts. Your Psi conflicts gain -1.

cards.name: Judgment by Success
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. Gain 1 Influence whenever you win two or more conflicts in the same round.

cards.name: Mines
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. Opponents' fleets that attack you take 1 damage (fleet is rotated after the conflict).

cards.name: Secondary Control
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. You may have two Agendas in play simultaneously (normally limited to one).

cards.name: Vital Interests
cards.text: Faction Enhancement. Once per round, you may spend 2 Influence to force all other players to support or oppose a conflict you initiate.

cards.name: Censure
cards.text: Attach to an opponent's Fleet. That fleet's Military value is reduced by 2 (minimum 1).

cards.name: Mass Drivers
cards.text: Attach to a Fleet. That fleet gains +3 Military. If you win a Military conflict with this fleet, the loser also loses 1 additional Influence.

cards.name: Commerce Raiding
cards.text: Global Enhancement. At the start of each round, each player with no Location cards in play loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Armed Resistance
cards.text: Attach to a Location card. That Location gains +2 Military defense. Opponents targeting this Location lose 1 Influence even if they win.

cards.name: Exploitation
cards.text: Attach to a Location card. That Location provides 1 extra Influence per round.

cards.name: Fleet Support Base
cards.text: Attach to a Location card. One fleet associated with this Location gains +2 Military while this card is in play.

cards.name: Planetary Defenses
cards.text: Attach to a Location card. Opponents must win a Military conflict to take control of this Location.

cards.name: Salvage Yard
cards.text: Attach to a Location card. Once per round, you may take a Fleet card from your discard pile and put it into play at half its Military value (rounded down).

cards.name: Triluminary
cards.text: Minbari Character only. That character gains +2 Psi and +2 Diplomacy. Minbari only.

cards.name: Stealth Technology
cards.text: Minbari Fleet only. That fleet gains +3 Military and cannot be targeted by fleet-targeting Enhancement cards.

cards.name: Crystal Cities
cards.text: Minbari Location only. That Location provides 2 Influence per round instead of 1.

cards.name: Book of G'Quan
cards.text: Narn Character only. That character gains +2 Intrigue and +2 Leadership.

cards.name: Energy Mines
cards.text: Narn Fleet only. That fleet gains +2 Military. Opponents' fleets that attack this fleet take 1 extra damage.

cards.name: A Good Bluff
cards.text: Play during any conflict. Add 3 to your conflict total. Discard after use.

cards.name: Accident
cards.text: Play during any conflict. One opposing character of your choice is rotated immediately.

cards.name: Affirm Alliance
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 1 Influence. You and one other player agree not to attack each other this round.

cards.name: Armistice
cards.text: Play before a conflict resolves. Cancel one Military conflict. No Aftermath cards may be played.

cards.name: Avert Incident
cards.text: Play when targeted by an Intrigue conflict. Add 2 to your defense total.

cards.name: Balance
cards.text: Play any time. All players gain 1 Influence. No conflicts may be initiated this round after this card is played.

cards.name: Carpe Diem
cards.text: Play during your Action Phase. Take one additional action this round.

cards.name: Change of Plans
cards.text: Play before a conflict is initiated. Change the conflict type to a different type of your choice.

cards.name: Changing Opinion
cards.text: Play any time. Move one player from supporting to opposing (or vice versa) in an active conflict.

cards.name: Chaos Reigns
cards.text: Play any time. All players must discard one card at random.

cards.name: Chrysalis
cards.text: Minbari only. Play during your Action Phase. Replace Delenn with Delenn Transformed in your Ambassador Zone if she is currently in play. Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Competing Interests
cards.text: Play before a conflict. One player who is supporting an opponent's conflict must switch to opposing instead, or withdraw from the conflict.

cards.name: Concentrated Effort
cards.text: Play before you initiate a conflict. Gain +3 to that conflict's total.

cards.name: Conflicting Desires
cards.text: Play any time. Choose two players. They must each either support or oppose the current active conflict.

cards.name: Conflicting Loyalties
cards.text: Play any time. Each player must discard one card or rotate one of their Inner Circle characters.

cards.name: Confusion in Chaos
cards.text: Play any time. All players shuffle their hands into their draw piles and draw the same number of cards.

cards.name: Contact with Shadows
cards.text: Play any time. Draw 2 cards. If you have Morden in play, draw 3 cards instead.

cards.name: Contact with Vorlons
cards.text: Play any time. Draw 2 cards from your draw pile.

cards.name: Coordinated Fire
cards.text: Play during a Military conflict you are involved in. Add 2 to your fleet Military total for each fleet you have committed to this conflict.

cards.name: Cut Supply Lines
cards.text: Play before a Military conflict. One opposing fleet's Military value is halved (rounded down) for this conflict.

cards.name: Decisive Tactics
cards.text: Play before a conflict resolves. The winner gains 1 extra Influence and the loser loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Declaration of War
cards.text: Play at the start of a round. For this round, all Military conflicts reward 1 extra Influence.

cards.name: Defame Ambassador
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent's ambassador loses 2 Diplomacy until the end of the round.

cards.name: Destiny Fulfilled
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 2 Influence. You may not initiate conflicts this round.

cards.name: Diplomatic Blunder
cards.text: Play after an opponent wins a Diplomacy conflict. That player loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Diplomatic Immunity
cards.text: Play when your ambassador is targeted in a conflict. Your ambassador cannot be targeted this round.

cards.name: Early Warning
cards.text: Play when an opponent initiates a conflict against you. You may look at their hand before the conflict resolves.

cards.name: Emergency Military Aid
cards.text: Play during a Military conflict. Bring one fleet from your hand into play immediately for this conflict only.

cards.name: Exploration
cards.text: Play any time. Search your draw pile for a Location card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your draw pile.

cards.name: Fleets on the Border
cards.text: Play at the start of a round. All players' fleets are considered committed to border patrol; fleets cannot be rotated for effects this round.

cards.name: For My People
cards.text: Play any time. One of your faction characters who is in Supporting Role immediately moves to Inner Circle for free.

cards.name: For the Common Good
cards.text: Play any time. All players gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: For the Good of All
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 1 Influence for each other player who did not win a conflict this round.

cards.name: Forces Collide
cards.text: Play during a Military conflict. All fleets in play must immediately participate in this conflict. No Aftermath cards may be played afterward.

cards.name: Hidden Knowledge
cards.text: Play any time. Look at one opponent's hand. You may discard one card from it.

cards.name: Hire Raiders
cards.text: Play during a Military conflict. Add 2 to your Military total. Discard this card.

cards.name: Hour of the Wolf
cards.text: Play at the start of a round. For this round, all conflicts cost 1 more Influence to initiate.

cards.name: Internal Strife
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent must rotate one of their Inner Circle characters.

cards.name: Intrigues Mature
cards.text: Play any time. Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Knowledge of Shadows
cards.text: Play any time. Look at one opponent's entire hand. If they have Morden, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Knowledge of the Soul
cards.text: Play any time. Search your draw pile for any one card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your draw pile.

cards.name: Lack of Subtlety
cards.text: Play after an opponent plays an Event card. Cancel that card's effect.

cards.name: Level the Playing Field 3+9
cards.text: Play any time. The player with the most Influence gives 3 Influence to the player with the least. (Errata: triggering condition is a spread of 9 or more Influence between highest and lowest.)

cards.name: Liquidating Assets
cards.text: Play any time. Discard up to 3 cards from your hand. Gain 1 Influence for each card discarded.

cards.name: Lockdown
cards.text: Play at start of round. No player may recruit characters or play Enhancements this round.

cards.name: Long Term Investment
cards.text: Play any time. Pay 2 Influence now; gain 4 Influence at the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Medical Assistance
cards.text: Play any time. Heal one face-down character in your Inner Circle.

cards.name: Meditation
cards.text: Play any time. Draw 3 cards, then discard 2.

cards.name: Merchandising B5
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Moral Quandary
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent must choose: discard 1 card or lose 1 Influence.

cards.name: News of Galactic Import
cards.text: Play any time. All players draw 1 card.

cards.name: Not Meant to Be
cards.text: Play after a conflict resolves. Negate the winner's Influence gain from that conflict.

cards.name: Political Realignment
cards.text: Play any time. One player must move one of their Inner Circle characters to Supporting Role. That player gains 1 Influence.

cards.name: Popular Support
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 2 Influence if you currently have the fewest Influence points among all players.

cards.name: Prolonged Talks
cards.text: Play before a Diplomacy conflict. That conflict's Influence reward is doubled. All participants must commit their ambassador.

cards.name: Rally to the Cause
cards.text: Play when supporting another player's conflict. Add 2 to the total for the side you are supporting.

cards.name: Ramming
cards.text: Play during a Military conflict. Sacrifice one of your fleets to deal 3 damage to an opposing fleet (reduce that fleet's Military by 3 for this conflict).

cards.name: Recalled to Service
cards.text: Play any time. Return one fleet from your discard pile to play.

cards.name: Sanctions
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent loses 1 Influence for each Location card you have in play.

cards.name: Secret Strike
cards.text: Play before a conflict. You initiate a Military conflict without revealing which fleet you are using until resolution.

cards.name: Secret Vorlon Aid
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 2 Influence. If Kosh Naranek is in your Inner Circle, gain 3 Influence instead.

cards.name: Seduction
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent's Inner Circle character temporarily joins your side for one conflict this round.

cards.name: Self Doubt
cards.text: Play during any conflict. One opposing character loses 2 from their primary stat for this conflict.

cards.name: Shadow Strike
cards.text: Play during a conflict. Add 4 to your total. Your characters cannot be healed after this conflict if you lose.

cards.name: Short Term Goals
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 1 Influence immediately.

cards.name: Short Term Investment
cards.text: Play any time. Pay 1 Influence; gain 2 Influence at the start of next round.

cards.name: Sneak Attack
cards.text: Play before a conflict. The opponent cannot play Event cards in response to this conflict.

cards.name: Sortie
cards.text: Play during a Military conflict. Your fleets gain +1 Military for each fleet you have committed to this conflict.

cards.name: Special Ops
cards.text: Play before an Intrigue conflict. Add 3 to your Intrigue total.

cards.name: Strafing Run
cards.text: Play during a Military conflict. The loser's highest Military fleet is rotated.

cards.name: Strategic Reassignment
cards.text: Play any time. Move one character from your Supporting Role to Inner Circle or vice versa for free.

cards.name: Subliminal Influence
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent must support your next conflict, providing their full Psi stat value.

cards.name: Support Babylon 5
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 1 Influence. One Enhancement card on Babylon 5 is rotated.

cards.name: The Opposition Rises
cards.text: Play during a conflict. All players not currently involved must either support or oppose this conflict.

cards.name: The Price of Power
cards.text: Play any time. The player with the most Influence loses 2 Influence. If there is a tie, each tied player loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Trade Windfall
cards.text: Play any time. Gain 1 Influence for each Location card you have in play.

cards.name: Underworld Connections
cards.text: Play any time. Draw 2 cards. If N'Grath is in your Inner Circle, draw 3 instead.

cards.name: Universe Today Feature
cards.text: Play any time. Reveal your hand. Gain 1 Influence for each Agenda card revealed.

cards.name: Unrecognized Data
cards.text: Play any time. Look at the top 3 cards of any player's draw pile. Leave them in any order.

cards.name: Victory in My Grasp
cards.text: Play when you are winning a conflict. Gain 1 extra Influence from that conflict.

cards.name: Vorlon Rescue
cards.text: Play when one of your Inner Circle characters would be discarded. That character is moved to Supporting Role instead of discarded.

cards.name: War by Popular Decree
cards.text: Play at start of round. All players must initiate or join a Military conflict this round or lose 1 Influence.

cards.name: What Do You Want?
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent must discard one card of your choice (you name the type: Character, Fleet, etc.).

cards.name: Who Are You?
cards.text: Play any time. One opponent must reveal their entire hand to all players.

cards.name: You Are Not Ready
cards.text: Play when an opponent initiates a conflict against you. That conflict is cancelled; no Aftermath cards may be played.

cards.name: You Know My Reputation
cards.text: Play before initiating a conflict. Add 2 to your total. The opponent may not recruit backup characters.

cards.name: Approval of the Grey
cards.text: Minbari only. Play after winning any conflict. Gain 1 Influence and heal one face-down character.

cards.name: Assigning Blame
cards.text: Play after losing any conflict. One opponent loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Battle Tested
cards.text: Play after participating in a Military conflict. One of your characters gains +1 Leadership permanently.

cards.name: Blood Oath
cards.text: Play after losing any conflict. Declare a Blood Oath against the winner; your conflicts against them gain +2 for the rest of the game.

cards.name: Casualty Reports
cards.text: Play after a Military conflict. Each player who participated must rotate one fleet. Gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Combat Experience
cards.text: Play after participating in a Military conflict. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Crisis of Self
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose a conflict. That opponent must discard 2 cards.

cards.name: Despair
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose any conflict. That opponent loses 2 Influence.

cards.name: Develop Relationship
cards.text: Play after any conflict. You and one other participant each draw 1 card.

cards.name: Diplomatic Advantage
cards.text: Play after winning a Diplomacy conflict. Gain 2 Influence and draw 1 card.

cards.name: Disenchantment
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose a Diplomacy conflict. That opponent loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Disgrace
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose a Military conflict. That opponent's ambassador is rotated until healed.

cards.name: Enrage
cards.text: Play after losing a Diplomacy conflict. Immediately initiate a free Military conflict against the winner.

cards.name: Exploit Opportunities
cards.text: Play after winning an Intrigue conflict. Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Focus Your Efforts
cards.text: Play after winning any conflict. Move one card from your discard pile to your hand.

cards.name: Glory
cards.text: Play after winning a Diplomacy or Military conflict. Gain 2 Influence.

cards.name: Grievance
cards.text: Play after winning any conflict. One opponent must discard 1 card.

cards.name: Guilt
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they win a Military conflict. That opponent loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Harvest Souls
cards.text: Play after any conflict. Take 2 cards at random from the losing player's hand.

cards.name: Hidden Agent
cards.text: Play after winning an Intrigue conflict. Look at one opponent's hand and take 1 card of your choice.

cards.name: Hunted
cards.text: Play on an opponent after any Intrigue conflict. That opponent's highest-Intrigue character is damaged.

cards.name: In the Line of Duty
cards.text: Play after any conflict in which your ambassador participated. Heal your ambassador if damaged.

cards.name: Inevitable Destiny
cards.text: Play after any conflict. Gain 1 Influence for each character you had participating.

cards.name: Intolerable Interference
cards.text: Play after losing any conflict. Gain 1 Influence. The winner may not initiate a conflict against you next round.

cards.name: It Will Be His Undoing
cards.text: Play after losing any conflict. That opponent's ambassador loses 2 from all stats until end of round.

cards.name: Lamentations
cards.text: Play after losing any conflict. Heal one face-down character in your Inner Circle.

cards.name: Learning Experience
cards.text: Play after participating in an Intrigue conflict. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Left Vulnerable
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose a Diplomacy conflict. That opponent's characters lose 1 Diplomacy until end of round.

cards.name: Loss of Face
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose any conflict. That opponent loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Martyr
cards.text: Play after any conflict in which one of your characters was discarded. Gain 3 Influence.

cards.name: Negotiated Surrender
cards.text: Play after a Military conflict. The loser may keep one fleet from being rotated. Gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: News of Defeat
cards.text: Play after a Military conflict. The loser must discard 1 card.

cards.name: Nightmares
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose any conflict. That opponent must skip drawing a card at end of this round.

cards.name: No Escape
cards.text: Play after a Military conflict. The loser may not withdraw any fleets; all committed fleets are rotated.

cards.name: Older but Wiser
cards.text: Play after participating in a Diplomacy conflict. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Paying for Sins
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose an Intrigue conflict. That opponent must rotate their highest-Intrigue character.

cards.name: Personal Enemies
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose any conflict. One of your characters gains +1 to all stats when opposing that player this round.

cards.name: Personal Involvement
cards.text: Play after losing any conflict. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Personal Sacrifice
cards.text: Play after winning any conflict. Gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Protests
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose a Diplomacy conflict. All other players gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Public Apology
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose a Military conflict. That opponent loses 2 Influence.

cards.name: Racial Hatred
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose any conflict. All conflicts between you and that player gain +1 for the rest of the game.

cards.name: Refugees
cards.text: Play after winning a Military conflict. Gain 1 Influence for each Location card you have in play.

cards.name: Renowned Victory
cards.text: Play after winning a Military conflict. Gain 1 additional Influence. All your fleets gain +1 Military until end of round.

cards.name: Repairing the Past
cards.text: Play after winning any conflict. Heal one face-down character in your Inner Circle.

cards.name: Rescue
cards.text: Play after a Military conflict. Return one rotated fleet to unrotated state.

cards.name: Retribution
cards.text: Play after winning any conflict. The loser must rotate one of their Inner Circle characters.

cards.name: Reverse Advances
cards.text: Play after losing a Diplomacy or Intrigue conflict. Negate the winner's Influence gain.

cards.name: Rise to Power
cards.text: Play after winning a Military conflict. Gain 2 Influence.

cards.name: Rivalry
cards.text: Play after participating in a Diplomacy conflict. Gain 1 Influence if you were the initiator or if you supported the winner.

cards.name: Secondary Experience
cards.text: Play after any conflict in which you participated as a supporter and the initiator won. Gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Skeletons in the Closet
cards.text: Play after any conflict. Look at the losing player's hand; you may discard 1 card from it.

cards.name: Successful Manipulation
cards.text: Play after winning an Intrigue conflict. Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Under Pressure
cards.text: Play after losing an Intrigue conflict. Gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: United Front
cards.text: Play after winning a Diplomacy conflict. Gain 1 Influence and draw 1 card.

cards.name: Vendetta
cards.text: Play after losing any conflict. The winner's next conflict gain is reduced by 2.

cards.name: War Hero
cards.text: Play after winning a Military conflict. One of your characters gains +2 Leadership permanently.

cards.name: Wear and Tear
cards.text: Play after a Military conflict. All fleets that participated are rotated.

cards.name: Wounded
cards.text: Play on an opponent after they lose an Intrigue or Military conflict. One of their Inner Circle characters is damaged.

cards.name: Commercial Telepaths
cards.text: Rotate this Group and target a Character who is not targeted by Commercial Telepaths. That Character gains a bonus to their Diplomacy equal to half their Psi (rounded up) while this Group remains rotated.

cards.name: Counterintelligence
cards.text: Rotate this Group during any Intrigue conflict. Add 3 to your Intrigue total.

cards.name: Damage Control Team
cards.text: Rotate this Group after any Military conflict. Unrotate one of your fleets.

cards.name: Diplomatic Corps
cards.text: Rotate this Group during any Diplomacy conflict. Add 2 to your Diplomacy total.

cards.name: Extended Contacts
cards.text: Rotate this Group any time. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Government Opposition
cards.text: Rotate this Group any time. One opponent loses 1 Influence.

cards.name: Interstellar Corporation
cards.text: At the start of each round, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: ISN
cards.text: Rotate this Group any time. Force one opponent to reveal their hand to all players.

cards.name: Military Cadre
cards.text: Rotate this Group during any Military conflict. Add 2 to your Military total.

cards.name: Military Telepaths
cards.text: Rotate this Group during any Psi conflict. Add 3 to your Psi total.

cards.name: Motivated Leaders
cards.text: All your characters in Inner Circle gain +1 Leadership permanently. Discard after this effect triggers.

cards.name: Observers
cards.text: Rotate this Group after any conflict. Look at all players' hands simultaneously.

cards.name: Rabble Rousers
cards.text: Rotate this Group any time. One opponent must discard 1 card.

cards.name: Ranger Strike Team
cards.text: Rotate this Group during any Military or Intrigue conflict. Add 2 to your total.

cards.name: Rangers Surveillance
cards.text: Rotate this Group any time. Look at the top 3 cards of any player's draw pile and rearrange them.

cards.name: Secret Police
cards.text: Rotate this Group during any Intrigue conflict. Add 2 to your Intrigue total. If you win, the loser must also rotate one character.

cards.name: Spin Doctors
cards.text: Rotate this Group after any conflict. Change the perceived winner of a Diplomacy conflict for Influence gain purposes (you gain their Influence; they gain none).

cards.name: War College
cards.text: Rotate this Group during any Military conflict. Add 2 to your Military total.

cards.name: Imperial Telepaths
cards.text: Centauri only. Rotate this Group during any Psi conflict. Add 3 to your Psi total. If you win, the loser must discard 1 card.

cards.name: Influential Lords
cards.text: Centauri only. At the start of each round, gain 1 Influence if you have 3 or more Centauri characters in your Inner Circle.

cards.name: Psi Corps Intelligence
cards.text: Human only. Rotate this Group during any Intrigue or Psi conflict. Add 2 to your total.

cards.name: Religious Caste
cards.text: Minbari only. At the start of each round, if you have no damaged characters, gain 1 Influence.

cards.name: Warrior Caste
cards.text: Minbari only. While in play, all Minbari fleets gain +1 Military.

cards.name: Wind Swords
cards.text: Minbari only. Rotate this Group during any Military conflict. Add 3 to your Military total.

cards.name: Narn Rabble
cards.text: Narn only. Rotate this Group during any Diplomacy or Military conflict. Add 2 to your total.

cards.name: Thenta Makur
cards.text: Narn only. Rotate this Group during any Intrigue conflict. Add 4 to your Intrigue total.

cards.name: Centauri Prime
cards.text: Centauri homeworld. Centauri only. Provides 2 Influence per round. Cannot be seized by Military conflict.

cards.name: Immolan V
cards.text: Centauri colony world. Provides 1 Influence per round. Centauri Military conflicts defending this Location gain +1.

cards.name: Ragesh III
cards.text: Centauri agricultural colony. Provides 1 Influence per round.

cards.name: Earth
cards.text: Human homeworld. Human only. Provides 2 Influence per round. Cannot be seized by Military conflict.

cards.name: Mars Colony
cards.text: Human colony on Mars. Provides 1 Influence per round. Human Intrigue conflicts here gain +1.

cards.name: Proxima III
cards.text: Human colony. Provides 1 Influence per round. Human Military conflicts here gain +1.

cards.name: Transfer Point Io
cards.text: Neutral trading hub. Any faction may control this. Provides 1 Influence per round. Draw 1 extra card per round while controlling this.

cards.name: Minbar
cards.text: Minbari homeworld. Minbari only. Provides 2 Influence per round. Cannot be seized by Military conflict.

cards.name: Minbari Protectorate
cards.text: Minbari protected world. Provides 1 Influence per round. Minbari Diplomacy conflicts here gain +1.

cards.name: Narn Homeworld
cards.text: Narn homeworld. Narn only. Provides 2 Influence per round. Cannot be seized by Military conflict.

cards.name: Quadrant 14
cards.text: Narn border territory. Provides 1 Influence per round. Narn Military conflicts here gain +2.

cards.name: Quadrant 37
cards.text: Narn outer territory. Provides 1 Influence per round.

cards.name: Sleeping Z'ha'dum
cards.text: Shadow homeworld. Any faction. Provides 2 Influence per round. While in play, all Intrigue conflicts gain +1. Cannot be seized by Diplomacy conflicts.
